_doc: US-local Decision Day (final regular-season day) per season; drives the R1 playoff filter (docs/spikes/E1-playoffs.md). 2020 additionally excludes the MLS-is-Back knockout window. Add each new season when the league publishes its calendar; a missing season excludes nothing (degrades safely).

neutral_site_windows._doc: MLS-is-Back group stage (counted as RS) was played at a neutral venue (Disney).
